cues.text: 手機在桌上
cues.tr: Lesson 14: Cell phone on the table

cues.text: 你看到我的手機了嗎？
cues.tr: Have you seen my cell phone?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 不是在桌上嗎？
cues.tr: Isn't it on the table?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 桌上哪裡？我怎麼沒看到？
cues.tr: Where is it on the table? Why don't I see it?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 就在電腦旁邊，你把它移到那裡了不是嗎？
cues.tr: It's right next to the computer. You moved it there, didn't you?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 可是我記得我把手機放在沙發上。
cues.tr: But I remember putting my cell phone on the couch.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 不對，我剛剛看到你把手機拿到桌子上了。
cues.tr: No, I just saw you put it on the table.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 可能是我忘記了，桌上東西太多了。
cues.tr: Maybe I forgot, there's too much stuff on the table.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 你把書拿開看看，手機應該在下面。
cues.tr: Take the book and look at it, the cell phone should be underneath.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 啊，看到了，手機被書壓住了。
cues.tr: Ah, I see, the cell phone is pressed by the book.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 所以我說不用找，手機就在桌上啊。
cues.tr: That's why I said I don't need to look for it, it's on the table.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 謝謝你幫我找，桌子上真的太亂了。
cues.tr: Thank you for helping me find it, the table is really messy.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 你要不要把桌子整理一下？東西太多了容易找不到。
cues.tr: Do you want to organize the table? There are too many things to find.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 也是，我應該把書本和雜物整理好。
cues.tr: Yes, I should organize my books and other things.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 你把書本放回書架上吧，這樣桌面會清爽很多。
cues.tr: Why don't you put the books back on the bookshelf, so that the table will be much fresher.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 好，我等一下就把那些書放回去。
cues.tr: Okay, I'll put those books back later.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 還有那個杯子，把它也放到廚房吧。
cues.tr: And that cup, put it in the kitchen too.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 對，這樣桌子就不會這麼亂了。
cues.tr: Yes, then the table will not be so messy.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 把桌子整理好以後，東西就很容易找到了。
cues.tr: After the table is organized, things will be easy to find.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 沒錯，我以後會記得把東西放回原位。
cues.tr: That's right. I'll remember to put things back where I found them.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 這樣就不會再發生找不到手機的事了。
cues.tr: That way, you won't find your cell phone again.
cues.speaker: B
